changelog: FIX — EPG channel picker showing 'No matching channels' for every game even though backend was returning matches. Root cause: my Moshi wire models were nested inside `object SportsApi`, which the KotlinJsonAdapterFactory reflection adapter couldn't resolve cleanly. Moved them to top-level data classes in SportsModels.kt (matching the pattern used by every other Sports response model).
Verified server-side: Anaheim Ducks @ Vegas Golden Knights returns Sportsnet East/Ontario/Pacific/West/360/World/CBC Calgary etc. all confirmed airing the right NHL programme.
Also hardened warmEpg POST to use a proper MediaType instead of deprecated null-MediaType form (newer OkHttp throws on null).
